File with Dangerous Type"}], "description": "pip handles concatenated tar and ZIP files as ZIP files regardless of filename or whether a file is both a tar and ZIP file. This behavior could result in confusing installation behavior, such as installing \"incorrect\" files according to the filename of the archive. title: pip has an interpretation conflict due to handling both concatenated tar and ZIP files as ZIP files
